## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New/updated tests added for changed logic
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] Prisma schema migration created (`npm run db:migrate`) if schema changed
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or tokens committed
